audit_traces.check: The governed correction supersedes only the stale dispatch head and the v2 exact head matches the replayed repository head
audit_traces.threshold: v2 exact_start_head and checker actual head both equal 8504cafb29148346089bb06abb00a9374fc3a961 with denominator_change_count 0
audit_traces.value: v2 packet, correction event, current HEAD, and checker head all identify 8504cafb29148346089bb06abb00a9374fc3a961
audit_traces.source_of_truth: worker-packets/pkr-a1-exec-api.v2.json, artifacts/event-pkr-a1-start-head-correction.json, ledger seq 20, and exact-head checker
evidence: correction event records denominator_change_count=0 and supersedes dispatch provenance only

audit_traces.check: The saved checker resolves local arrow identifiers, detects their captures, fails closed on unresolved identifiers, and remains deterministic
audit_traces.threshold: 3 checker tests pass; invalid fixture reports captured_dependency_count 4 and uninspectable_callback_count 1; repeated invalid output is byte-identical
audit_traces.value: 3 tests passed and 0 failed with the asserted negative metrics
evidence: accepts explicit deps and params on both receivers
invalid fixture includes capturedCallback and importedCallback identifiers

audit_traces.check: Lite lint resolves local arrow and function-declaration identifiers and fails closed on imported identifiers
audit_traces.threshold: The dedicated positive and negative lint cases pass within the complete lint suite
evidence: positive case passes local const transform and function finish identifiers
negative case reports captured client and message plus uninspectable importedCallback

audit_traces.check: The wait operation declares abortable through deps and preserves the callback target identity and cancellation cleanup
audit_traces.threshold: Lite suite passes with wait deps { signal, abort }, callback target equal to wait, and failed close result equal to caller abort
evidence: abort is an atom whose factory returns abortable
wait receives signal and abort from declared deps
close result preserves the caller abort reason

audit_traces.check: The exact-head source tree has no inline execution contract gaps, captures, or uninspectable callbacks
audit_traces.threshold: All gap metrics equal 0 and inline_exec_callsite_count equals 51
audit_traces.value: 51 call sites; every gap metric equals 0
audit_traces.source_of_truth: scripts/check-inline-exec-contract.mjs on the v2 exact head working tree

audit_traces.check: The full PKR product diff stays within the original allowed paths and has no whitespace errors
audit_traces.threshold: Zero forbidden product paths and git diff --check exit 0
audit_traces.value: All listed product and untracked paths match the v1 allowed paths; diff check returned empty output
audit_traces.source_of_truth: Git diff from v2 exact_start_head and current untracked inventory
evidence: No docs, changeset, benchmark, or pnpm-lock path appears
Remediation product changes are limited to Lite tests, Lite lint source/tests, and inline checker source/tests/fixtures

audit_traces.check: The saved inline checker replay proves local function-declaration identifier resolution
audit_traces.threshold: At least one checker fixture invokes ctx.exec or scope.run with fn set to a local function declaration and asserts zero uninspectable callbacks
audit_traces.value: No checker fixture invokes a local function declaration identifier; only the separate lint suite executes function finish
evidence: valid checker fixture declares const operation as an arrow and uses fn: operation
invalid checker fixture uses capturedCallback and importedCallback identifiers
No checker fixture contains a function declaration used as fn
The checker source contains a function-declaration branch, but source inspection is not an executed replay

wall_gate.reason: The original head and capture defects are corrected and every requested gate is green, but the saved checker suite does not execute the requested local function-declaration identifier path.
